attempts: Chrome extension diagnostics passed and the owner profile was opened.
Discord was opened in Chrome, but a full DOM read timed out.
After reducing the request to tab listing and then session naming, both lightweight calls timed out and reset the connection.

verifiedFromOwnerEvidence.source: Owner-provided screenshots and pasted channel exports; no private chat content was stored.

notClaimed: No claim that every visible server/channel was read.
No claim that historical channel scrolling completed.
No user-account message or destructive Discord action was performed.
exactBlocker: Codex Chrome Extension communication times out before a lightweight browser operation completes. Plugin reinstall/reconnect is required for the remaining historical scroll audit.
